data.description:
Goal:
Add an overview-screen stale beat grooming feature that identifies beats older than 7 days and lets a user trigger an AI-backed review that classifies each stale beat as still relevant, changed shape, or no longer relevant. Include model/agent choice at the review trigger/config surface where existing agent configuration patterns support it.

Verification:
1. Run `bun run lint` and expect no lint failures.
2. Run `bunx tsc --noEmit` and expect no type errors.
3. Run `bun run test` and expect the default suite to pass.
4. Run `bun run build` and expect the Next.js build to complete.
5. Open the overview screen and confirm stale beats older than 7 days appear in a right-side grooming surface with an AI review trigger and model/agent controls.

Constraints:
Keep the first implementation aligned with existing overview and agent-setting patterns. Do not introduce an alternate work tracker, workflow graph, or PR workflow.
